priority_basis: R-016 identified that the capability, navigation integration, and monotonic clock checks remained separate and could be consumed inconsistently.
action: Compose R-014 capability validity, R-015 navigation integration, and R-016 monotonic clock binding into one fail-closed replay-acceptance gate.

progress.finding: Replay interpretation needs one fail-closed boundary that requires every lower-level evidence layer and binds them to one opaque navigation identity.

handoff: Vercel Studio should invoke evaluateEventTimingReplayAcceptance immediately before replay interpretation and expose only its privacy-bounded result; lower-level packet success must not independently authorize interpretation.
limits: No deployed Vercel integration invokes the composite gate.
No physical iPhone Safari reload, backgrounding, or wall-clock-adjustment packet was evaluated.
Production freshness thresholds remain proposed rather than empirically calibrated.
Acceptance proves structural compatibility, not event delivery, replay completeness, visual divergence, responsiveness, or causality.
next_action: Wire the composite gate into the deployed replay path, then collect same-navigation physical iPhone Safari packets across normal use, reload, backgrounding, and wall-clock adjustment.
